        "bitoffset": 2

        "bitoffset": 3

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3

      },

        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Engine_state = ENGINE_RUNNING": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Key_off_engaged_": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "sure_eng_stop": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Engine_stalled (extern)": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Vehicle_speed_sensor_NVV <> 0": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1,

        "bitoffset": 3,

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "AC_Type_fitted_NVV = AC_COLD_LOOP": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 5,

      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 7,
